testcase.name: verifyRestrictedAccessAfterPlanExpiry

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (317, 663). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=145.0.7632.160) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [476b45946c1e00bc42d87fe414a01626, clickElement {id=f.EACF6ECB85C603BFC9C81A55EC33421F.d.D732CD6D9A9051C223A1EA6B1EAF6C03.e.137}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SAFWAN~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57923}, goog:processID: 8964, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57923/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (476b45946c1e00bc42d87fe414a01626)] -> xpath: //div[contains(text(),'Premium')]] Session ID: 476b45946c1e00bc42d87fe414a01626

testcase.error:
org.openqa.selenium.ElementClickInterceptedException: element click intercepted: Element
...
is not clickable at point (317, 663). Other element would receive the click:
...
